headline: How DuPont’s New Chromatography Resins for Advanced Therapies Could Influence DuPont de Nemours (DD) Investors
summary: Earlier this week, DuPont de Nemours announced the launch of its AmberChrom XT20 SL and XT30 SL slurried chromatography resins, designed to streamline purification workflows for oligonucleotide and peptide therapeutics by removing the resin hydration step before column packing. This move deepens DuPont’s footprint in bioprocessing solutions for advanced medicines, aligning its materials expertise with increasingly specialized therapeutic manufacturing needs. We’ll now examine how DuPont’s...

headline: Buenaventura Releases Q1 Production Results & Volume Sold
summary: BVN reports Q1 output, with multiple mines beating its guidance, led by strong silver and gold production across key operations.

raw.headline: Buenaventura Releases Q1 Production Results & Volume Sold

headline: DuPont Wins Two 2026 Edison Awards™
summary: DuPont (NYSE: DD) today announced that two of its innovative advanced solutions were recognized with the prestigious 2026 Edison Awards™. DuPont received Silver and Bronze honors for technologies that address critical sustainability and safety challenges across industries.

raw.headline: DuPont Wins Two 2026 Edison Awards™

headline: BASFY Expands Nunhem Seed Hub With 40M Euro Sustainable Investment
summary: BASF invests 40M Euro to upgrade seed processing in Nunhem, boosting capacity, sustainability and efficiency to meet rising global demand.
